'''鈭歵h-l-l''' ('''thalala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macrobrew|macrobrew]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macrobrew|macrobrew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| thalala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thalalithi|thalalithi]] || [[word:thalaliji|thalaliji]] || [[word:thalalishi|thalalishi]] || [[word:thalali|thalali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalaluthuth|thalaluthuth]] || [[word:thalalujuj|thalalujuj]] || [[word:thalalushush|thalalushush]] || [[word:thalal|thalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalaluthu|thalaluthu]] || [[word:thalaluju|thalaluju]] || [[word:thalalushu|thalalushu]] || [[word:thalalu|thalalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalufuth|thalalufuth]] || [[word:thalalufuj|thalalufuj]] || [[word:thalalufush|thalalufush]] || [[word:thalaluf|thalaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thalalethe|thalalethe]] || [[word:thalaleje|thalaleje]] || [[word:thalaleshe|thalaleshe]] || [[word:thalale|thalale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalalothoth|thalalothoth]] || [[word:thalalojoj|thalalojoj]] || [[word:thalaloshosh|thalaloshosh]] || [[word:thalal|thalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalotho|thalalotho]] || [[word:thalalojo|thalalojo]] || [[word:thalalosho|thalalosho]] || [[word:thalalo|thalalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalofoth|thalalofoth]] || [[word:thalalofoj|thalalofoj]] || [[word:thalalofosh|thalalofosh]] || [[word:thalalof|thalalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thalal忙th忙|thalal忙th忙]] || [[word:thalal忙j忙|thalal忙j忙]] || [[word:thalal忙sh忙|thalal忙sh忙]] || [[word:thalal忙|thalal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalalathath|thalalathath]] || [[word:thalalajaj|thalalajaj]] || [[word:thalalashash|thalalashash]] || [[word:thalal|thalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalatha|thalalatha]] || [[word:thalalaja|thalalaja]] || [[word:thalalasha|thalalasha]] || [[word:thalala|thalala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalafath|thalalafath]] || [[word:thalalafaj|thalalafaj]] || [[word:thalalafash|thalalafash]] || [[word:thalalaf|thalalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thalalasha|thalalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothalalasha|gothalalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithalalasha|gokithalalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thalaln眉sha|thalaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothalalnkn眉sha|gothalalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithalaln眉sha|gokithalaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thalalsh毛sha|thalalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothalalnksh毛sha|gothalalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithalalsh毛sha|gokithalalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thalalrosha|thalalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothalalnkrosha|gothalalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithalalrosha|gokithalalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalmusha|thalalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalalnkmusha|gothalalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalalmusha|gokithalalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thalalsherasha|thalalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothalalnksherasha|gothalalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithalalsherasha|gokithalalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thalalngasha|thalalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothalalnkngasha|gothalalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithalalngasha|gokithalalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thalalyasha|thalalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothalalnkyasha|gothalalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithalalyasha|gokithalalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thalalyamasha|thalalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothalalnkyamasha|gothalalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithalalyamasha|gokithalalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thalaln眉sh毛sha|thalaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothalalnkn眉sh毛sha|gothalalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithalaln眉sh毛sha|gokithalaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thalaln眉rosha|thalaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothalalnkn眉rosha|gothalalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithalaln眉rosha|gokithalaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalaln眉musha|thalaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalalnkn眉musha|gothalalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalaln眉musha|gokithalaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thalalsh毛n眉sha|thalalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothalalnksh毛n眉sha|gothalalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithalalsh毛n眉sha|gokithalalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thalalsh毛rosha|thalalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothalalnksh毛rosha|gothalalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithalalsh毛rosha|gokithalalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalsh毛musha|thalalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalalnksh毛musha|gothalalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalalsh毛musha|gokithalalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thalalron眉sha|thalalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothalalnkron眉sha|gothalalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithalalron眉sha|gokithalalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thalalrosh毛sha|thalalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothalalnkrosh毛sha|gothalalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithalalrosh毛sha|gokithalalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalromusha|thalalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalalnkromusha|gothalalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalalromusha|gokithalalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thalalmun眉sha|thalalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothalalnkmun眉sha|gothalalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithalalmun眉sha|gokithalalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thalalmush毛sha|thalalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothalalnkmush毛sha|gothalalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithalalmush毛sha|gokithalalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thalalmurosha|thalalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothalalnkmurosha|gothalalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithalalmurosha|gokithalalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thalal|thalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙l忙l|th忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothalal|hothalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙l忙l|hoth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothalal|hohothalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙l忙l|hohoth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thalal|n眉thalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙l忙l|n眉th忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thalal|n眉n眉thalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙l忙l|n眉n眉th忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thalal|n茂thalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙l忙l|n茂th忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thalal|n茂n茂thalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙l忙l|n茂n茂th忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthalal|luthalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙l忙l|luth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthalal|luluthalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙l忙l|luluth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithalal|lithalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙l忙l|lith忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithalal|lilithalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙l忙l|lilith忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothalal|kothalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙l忙l|koth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothalal|kokothalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙l忙l|kokoth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethalal|kethalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙l忙l|keth忙l忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethalal|kekethalal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙l忙l|keketh忙l忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
